title: B2B payments integration guide
excerpt: Build a B2B payments integration with Issuing. Check out our introductory guide to using [embedded finance for SaaS Platforms](https://stripe.com/guides/introduction-to-embedded-finance). Build a US B2B payments integration by using Stripe [Issuing](https://docs.stripe.com/issuing/how-issuing-works.md) to create cards for your business, employees, or contractors to make purchases on your behalf. By the end of this guide, you’ll know how to: - Create virtual cards for your own business - Use these cards to spend funds from your Issuing Balance
